name: @datalackey/typescript-build-config
description: Shared build configuration for TypeScript projects — ESLint, and future tsconfig/Prettier presets

_comments.exports: This block lists the config files that will be extended by files in in src/toplevel - which are copied to consuming project root folder. An example: eslint.config.js imports from '@datalackey/typescript-build-config/eslint'.
_comments.files: These are the files included in the package tarball. Dotfiles like .gitignore are excluded by npm by default and must be listed explicitly alongside src/.
